challenge: Medibank's post-claim member experience was fragmented — after a hospital admission, members were handed a list of providers and left to navigate their own recovery. The challenge was to reimagine that experience as something proactive, human, and genuinely useful, and then create a campaign identity that made people believe in it.
title: Re:Cover - Health that moves with you
solution: We started with the name. 'Re:Cover' — the colon as a structural beat, the capital C suggesting a fresh chapter. From there, the visual language was built around motion and momentum: gradients that shift from clinical to warm, type that leans forward, and an app UI that treats progress as something worth celebrating. The campaign extended across OOH, digital, and in-app onboarding, all pulling from the same core visual system.
